You can attack by pressing the Attack button (Confirm key).
Additionally, by holding down the Attack button for a short period of
time, you can perform a Charged Attack (Area of Effect attack).
Also, there are two types of charged attacks, and the type of each
weapon is indicated in the weapon description column. Please make good
use of these two types of charged attacks as you progress.
And then, let's skillfully approach the enemies and swiftly
mow them down. ※ (Although you will take damage, you can
defeat the enemies simply by colliding with them.)
